# NIP-52 Reference Card

### REFERENCE_CARD
NIP-52 defines calendar events with kinds 31922 (date-based) and 31923 (time-based). Common tags include `d` (required), `title` (required), `summary` (optional), `image` (optional), `location` (optional), `g` (optional), `p` (optional), `t` (optional), and `r` (optional). Date-based events require `start` and optionally `end` dates in ISO 8601 format. Time-based events require `start` and optionally `end` Unix timestamps, with optional time zones `start_tzid` and `end_tzid`,
